title: Newegg Fiscal Year 2025 Earnings - Profitability Turnaround Analysis
text:
Newegg Fiscal Year 2025 Financial Analysis and Profitability Turnaround.

Revenue & Growth Metrics: Newegg Commerce reported net sales of $1.44 billion, representing a 16% year-over-year increase from $1.24 billion in fiscal 2024. The company's Gross Merchandise Value reached $1.77 billion, up from $1.53 billion previously.

Profitability Turnaround: The most significant development was the dramatic improvement in bottom-line performance. The company's net loss contracted to just $4.9 million from a $43.3 million loss in 2024—representing an 89% reduction in losses.

Key Profitability Metrics: Metric | FY 2025 | FY 2024 | Change. Gross Profit | $168.5M | $131.5M | +28%. Adjusted EBITDA | $24.8M | $(9.5)M | Positive swing.

Assessment: Newegg demonstrated a substantial financial recovery, characterized by robust top-line growth and a near-elimination of its net loss. The company successfully pivoted from negative adjusted EBITDA to profitability, signaling improved operational efficiency and cost management alongside revenue expansion.
